summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GoSocial Stripe subscription system. Backend APIs fully functional (97.3% success), frontend pricing page working correctly with all required features implemented.

session_issues.issue: Session expires quickly requiring frequent re-login

working_features: Most Popular badge on Growth plan
Manage subscription button navigates to pricing

passed_tests: GET /api/billing/plans - Returns 3 plans with correct pricing
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns free status by default
Payment transaction created in DB after checkout session
Frontend pricing page shows 3 plan cards
Most Popular badge displayed on Growth plan
Billing nav item navigates to pricing page
